Container.Name: scrutiny-collector-omnibus
Container.Overview: Scrutiny Collector Omnibus (Hub/Spoke mode). Bundles the SMART, ZFS, MDADM, Btrfs, filesystem, and performance collectors in one spoke container. Requires a running Scrutiny web server instance. Optional collectors stay disabled until their schedule or startup variables are set and the required host mounts are provided.

Config.Name: Udev
Config.Description: Required for device detection. Do not change.

Config.Name: Disk 1
Config.Description: First disk to monitor. Add more Device entries for additional disks. For NVMe, pass both /dev/nvme0 (controller) and /dev/nvme0n1 (namespace).

Config.Name: Host Mount Root
Config.Description: Optional bind mount for filesystem or fio-backed mount visibility.

Config.Name: Btrfs State
Config.Description: Optional bind mount for persisted Btrfs scrub state.

Config.Name: Host Dev
Config.Description: Optional bind mount for MDADM discovery and broad device visibility.

Config.Name: Host mdstat
Config.Description: Optional bind mount for MDADM array state.

Config.Name: API Endpoint
Config.Description: Scrutiny web server URL (e.g. http://scrutiny-web:8080). Required.

Config.Name: Host ID
Config.Description: Unique identifier for this collector host. Shared by all bundled collectors unless overridden by collector-specific config.

Config.Name: API Token
Config.Description: Server auth token. Required when web.auth.enabled is true.

Config.Name: SMART Schedule
Config.Description: S.M.A.R.T data collection schedule (cron format).

Config.Name: SMART Startup
Config.Description: Run S.M.A.R.T collection immediately on container startup.

Config.Name: ZFS Schedule
Config.Description: ZFS pool collection schedule. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: ZFS Startup
Config.Description: Run ZFS pool collection immediately on container startup.

Config.Name: MDADM Schedule
Config.Description: MDADM collection schedule. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: MDADM Startup
Config.Description: Run MDADM collection immediately on container startup.

Config.Name: Btrfs Schedule
Config.Description: Btrfs collection schedule. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: Btrfs Startup
Config.Description: Run Btrfs collection immediately on container startup.

Config.Name: Filesystem Schedule
Config.Description: Filesystem capacity collection schedule. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: Filesystem Startup
Config.Description: Run filesystem capacity collection immediately on container startup.

Config.Name: Performance Schedule
Config.Description: fio benchmark schedule. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: Performance Startup
Config.Description: Run fio benchmarks immediately on container startup.

Config.Name: Performance Profile
Config.Description: Benchmark profile: quick or comprehensive.
